Movie.title: Movie
Movie.description: A movie or TV show available on the platform.

description.description: A short summary of the plot.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to the movie's thumbnail image.

videoUrl.description: URL to the movie's video file.

category.description: The genre or category of the movie.

releaseDate.description: The release date of the movie.

isFeatured.description: Whether the movie should be featured in the hero section.

views.description: The number of views of the movie.

watchlist.description: Array of movie IDs in the user's watchlist.

/users.description: Collection of user profiles and watchlists.
